title: Mazars: How to invest in an unbalanced world
section_path: Mazars: How to invest in an unbalanced world
section_path_text: Mazars: How to invest in an unbalanced world
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The Week
The global financial system is trying to cope with a series of exogenous shocks increasing in magnitude using internal tools. So far this has not been working. The shocks keep coming in and markets remain very volatile.
